headline: Today's top AI story: What's new in Claude Sonnet 5
bullets: Anthropic's new Claude Sonnet 5 closes the gap to the pricier Opus model series
New BioShocking attack manipulates AI browser into data theft
Anthropic rolls out Sonnet 5 with near-Opus 4.8 performance at a lower price
